issues.description: Condition missing: second power boost should only trigger if opponent has ≤2 Life cards. Current condition is 'Always' but should check opponent's life total.
Extraneous effect: second trigger object with DrawCard action has no basis in card text. Counter effect contains only two power boosts; no card draw is mentioned.
Duration should be 'DuringThisTurn' or similar to represent 'during this turn', not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which implies the boost lasts through the turn, not just until end.
